title: kalanchoe peltata var. peltata
intro: Kalanchoe peltata var. peltata is a succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family, commonly known as the "paddle plant" due to its flat, paddle-shaped leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Kalanchoe peltata var. peltata include its ability to support immune function, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
